calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Bresler for Nelson Tun Chaw and Gloria Moy Chaw, Petitioners (via Zoom).

The Court began by addressing the Order to Show Cause, which was ordered off calendar in light of Mr. Bresler's appearance and explanation.

Turning to the petition, the Court inquired about a declaration submitted by Faye Lee Bresler concerning the will. The Court noted that while Ms. Bresler's declaration addressed her role in drafting and witnessing the will, it did not explicitly state whether the unsigned copy of the will submitted in support of the petition was the same version she had witnessed. Mr. Bresler confirmed that the copy provided was indeed the same version as the one she drafted and witnessed.

Based on that clarification, the Court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Apr-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court noted that attorney Peter Bresler failed to appear and there is uncertainty regarding his status.

Sanctions in the amount of $250 were imposed on Peter Bresler for his failure to appear for the February 5, 2025 hearing.

The court shall issue an Order to Appear for attorney Peter Bresler and petitioners (Nelson Tun Chaw and Gloria Moy Chaw) to appear on April 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Petition for Confirmation of Trust Assets is also continued to the same date.

The court shall issue an Order to Show Cause for Peter Bresler to explain why he should not be further sanctioned in the amount of $250 for his failure to appear today. The hearing on Order to Show Cause is also set for April 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause Why Attorney Should Not Be Sanctioned
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Continued To Mar-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court noted that Mr. Peter H. Bresler filed papers on Monday but did not appear for the hearing. An Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause will be issued to Peter H. Bresler to appear on March 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to explain why sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed on them for their failure to appear. The hearing on the instant petition is also continued to the same date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Feb-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter H. Bresler for Nelson Tun Chaw and Gloria Moy Chaw, Petitioners (via Zoom).

The court inquired about the availability of signed copies of the wills. Mr. Bresler confirmed that signed copies are not available. The court suggested obtaining evidence from the notary book to confirm the decedents' signatures and any available information on witnesses.

The court continued the matter to February 5, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for submission of relevant evidence from the notary book and correction of notice issues and proper service.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
